calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:28 am
Judge Pro Tem Henry Shain, Clerk K. Liu, nothing on record, Dept. 525
Cause called for Small claims Appeal. Appellant Vladimir Privalov present in pro per. Respondent Lucy McAllister present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Henry Shain.


EXRA: Billing Statement, hurely agreement and case information collectively marked.
EXA1: Declaration of nullity of marriage marked

10:10 am
Exhibit retained, case submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Continued To Jan-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:39am
Judge Pro Tem Bob Aune, clerk - K. Liu, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Vladimir Privalov present in pro per. Respondent not present, special appearance by Samuels, Christiana. Judge Pro
Tem to determine validity of Ms. Samuels appearance and respondent's request for continuance.
Date of the continuance will be between Dec. 17, 2011 to Jan 15, 2012.

EXRA: copy of e-mail


9:50am
Case submitted. Exhibit retained
